baseline_description: Submit the candidate patch to the official SWE-bench evaluation harness and reject it when the harness marks the instance unresolved. Equivalently: run the repository's existing test suite. No model, no provider call, no judgement.
note: The comparison is not a leaderboard and not a model-comparison claim. It states that a zero-cost deterministic baseline was never measured against this benchmark, which leaves the panel figure without its first-order comparator.
